title: Regex compiled per call in sanitize_css_for_style_tag and load_theme_css
description: activitypub.rs:207 and theme.rs:85 both compile the same regex (`(?i)</\s*style`) on every call. load_extra_css is called on every HTML page render (index, profile, post), which means the same regex is compiled twice per page view. These should be static LazyLock<Regex> like the patterns in cards.rs already are. What goes wrong: unnecessary regex compilation overhead on every HTML page request—two allocations plus NFA construction per page view.
